screen_metadata.name: Project Master Registry & Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) Canvas

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px multi-column collaborative project tree interface)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Three-Pane Split Viewport Layout (Left Section Pane: Filterable active corporate projects directory; Center Section Canvas: Interactive hierarchical Work Breakdown Structure tree grid mapping parent tasks to child nodes; Right Drawer Component: Dynamic Milestone Progress Meter and Scope Metrics Inspector Sheets)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains permanent concurrent project folders and deep nested task canvas structures side-by-side)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The project master selection panel shifts into a toggleable top-bar selector menu, dedicating maximum vertical screen space to the WBS rows)

key_visible_sections.title: Project Scope Completion & Velocity Status Blocks

user_progression_routes.on_load: Acquire active project manager security credentials -> Read regional multi-tenant legal entity identifier codes -> Execute state request payload fetch from ProjectService.getProjects()
user_progression_routes.on_task_node_click: Asynchronously query internal task properties maps to fill resource assignments details tracking widgets panels without blocking layout frames

redirection_rules.condition: If a project instance tracking timeline exceeds planned delivery baseline parameters limits by more than a critical boundary variance limit (> 15.0%)
redirection_rules.action: Inject high-visibility orange warning overlay background wrappers onto active columns rows, and toggle project operational status tags inline to 'Delayed - Variance Audit Required'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User hits action element command click selector 'btn_provision_project'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop multi-step dialog onboarding form interface capturing CRM customer identifiers reference codes, total contract budget ceilings, operational statement-of-work (SOW) terms, and initial milestone targets mapping arrays

atoms.type: Semantic Status Pill Node UI Element
Semantic Status Pill Node UI Element
Tabular Numeric Progress Modifier Field Box
Micro Action Interactive Vector Button Button Icon

molecules.composition: Combines project alphanumeric sequence code tracking key + buyer profile customer company string title + aggregate financial budget balance indicator text box + current lifecycle execution state token badge component

Combines deep indentation node placeholder alignment space + toggle collapse chevron icon atom + monospaced task ID sequence label + descriptive title string field + progress calculation gauge element + child addition command button wrapper element

organisms.composition: High-density scrolling log grouping active corporate projects scopes, handling rapid multi-parameter searching filters and binding click events to update focus state variables rows pointers maps.

Dynamic nested grid sheet canvas executing recursive row listing matrices tracking task hierarchies fields, complete with column sorting capabilities, parent node fold actions loops, and row modification indicators grids.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Precision monospace numbers font used on execution values fields, calendar schedules, and task tracker keys to keep layout rows balanced strictly)

scales.project_header_large_title: font-size: 1.25rem (20px) | font-weight: 700 | tracking: letter-spacing tight text-transform regular

color_palette_hex.completion_teal_glow: #10B981 (Emerald/Teal Green Verified Scope Completion Status Token Indicator Highlight)
color_palette_hex.schedule_alert_orange: #F59E0B (Amber Gold Timeline Delay Slip Risk Visual Element Token Outline)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px standard workspace structural division block outer padding parameters)
spacing_and_borders.recursive_node_indent_unit: 1.5rem (24px horizontal tracking indentation shift per structural nesting level)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Charcoal Frame Partitions Alignment Separation Lines Layout)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: background-color properties transform settings focus map to value #334155 utilizing a swift ease-out duration curves time frame window of 100ms
transform scale parameters scale reduction adjustments modifier value down to 0.95 sizing bounds to register crisp feedback ticks profile configurations

accessibility_aria_roles.wbs_interactive_tree_grid: role='treegrid' housing hierarchical multi-tier expandable task rows configurations indices maps accompanied by valid aria-expanded boolean trackers properties
accessibility_aria_roles.project_directory_sidebar: role='navigation' accompanied by an explicit descriptive aria-label tracking active multi-tenant pipeline profiles views fields templates

local_reactive_state_variables.active_project_entity_focus_id: Tracks target highlighted project index folder row dataset primary lookup token string key used to hydrate task lists trees canvases (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.selected_task_node_focus_pointer: Tracks single task array node reference used to feed contextual information and resources limits properties inside inspector sheets widgets panels [object reference | null]
local_reactive_state_variables.is_provisioning_modal_visible: Boolean state variable dictating presentation configurations parameters toggling statement-of-work project provisioning wizard dialog fields overlays

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared systems global tenant context code parameters routing multi-tenant application domains boundaries configurations across business modules execution layers
global_application_context_bindings.crm_confirmed_sales_contracts_buffer: Global storage transaction queue data bus caching incoming stream data packages arriving asynchronously from revenue ops systems blocks to alert project managers of newly structured contract completions blueprints

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 semantic presentation blocks wrapped directly over standard Tailwind CSS class sets, running zero pre-compiler tasks scripts natively inside modular client-side modern ES6 asynchronous scripts structured to handle recursive layout rendering sweeps over deep nested row structures hierarchies patterns flawlessly
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Toggling parent folder node visibility switches or expanding a 5-level deep hierarchical WBS branch list must evaluate layout structures states calculations fields maps adjustments under an execution target threshold boundary parameter of 14ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind retrieved hierarchical task data maps arrays collection directly inside local work_breakdown_structure views cache stores, then apply lookup reference values straight forward into active_project_entity_focus_id parameter flag modifiers
Pass selected index mapping reference directly to selected_task_node_focus_pointer state local pointer variable to expose milestone specs widgets inside structural side details containers sheets

Broadcast project instantiation packets; append successfully generated record item parameters maps back inside projects_master_directory_dataset local display cache views arrays blocks; drop wizard interface overlays layer flags parameters variables

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /projects/resource-matrix (Advances web browser app router location framework coordinates metrics positions ahead into next sequence Screen PRJ_SCR_002 Human Capital Allocation Workspace Viewport)
